description: Audit your Node/TypeScript AI applications for OWASP LLM Top 10 issues.

scan.summary: Scan a project directory for AI security issues

options.severity: Minimum severity to display (critical, high, medium, low)
options.ci: CI mode: silent output, structured exit codes
options.project: Look up the named project in MongoDB and apply its rootPath + overrides

update.summary: Check for and apply rule + payload updates

selftest.summary: Run self-evaluating tests against bundled fixtures

history.summary: List or inspect scan runs persisted in MongoDB

ui.summary: Start the local web UI on http://localhost:<port>

user.summary: Manage the local web-UI user (create, rotate password)

project.summary: Create / list / show / delete reusable scan projects in MongoDB
